scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the hook using a relatable POV text overlay.
- Sets an aspirational tone through music and visuals.
- Introduces the core transformation from hesitation to confidence in speaking English.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: pov: जो English बोलने से घबराता था, but switched to Supernova and finally speaks with confidence.
